name: Aphrodisiac Scene
description:

★

⋆ I DO NOT RECOMMEND TO USE JLLM FOR THIS BOT, it will definitely struggle with multiple characters (but you can try, of course). They say that free DeepSeek is worse than paid, but still it's much better than JLLM; there are instructions on Reddit how to set it up for JanitorAI via proxy (Openrouter)

⋆ Upd: GLM and Gemini should be ok too

⋆ It's definitely not a "100-followers-special" or "I'm-qualified-now-for-verified-creator-status-special" or even "I've-been-posting-bots-on-JAI-for-a-year-already-special"; but the coincidences are real 😁 I had a low level of Ogata in my blood so had to make something with his cute little face 😼; also, I had this idea for a long time and I've recently finished botifying all the main GK characters, thus could finally make this bot!
